_meta.purpose: H4 轻量 — How to Program Crystals (program 590，与H3配套)
_meta.diff_angle: program前置链路(意图设定)；按intention页互链；比喻先洗手→拿干净碗→盛饭→端上桌

title: How to Program Crystals: Meaning, Steps & Intentions
secondary_kw: how to set an intention in a crystal
concept_focus: program_prerequisite_chain（前置链路：Cleanse→Charge→Activate→Program；比喻先洗手→拿干净碗→盛饭→端上桌）

local_concept_pair.metaphor: wash hands → take a clean bowl → fill it with food → serve it on the table (不用H1/H3的比喻)
local_concept_pair.order_rule: program is the last step — cleanse, charge, activate come first; programming sets a specific intention the stone becomes a tactile cue for
local_concept_pair.link_to_h1: For the full four-concept comparison (Cleanse, Charge, Activate, Program), see How to Cleanse Crystals

quiet-space.name: 1. Find a Quiet Space
quiet-space.tradition: A calm, undistracted setting is considered the right container for setting an intention — the ritual begins with stillness.
quiet-space.practical: No physical effect — this is about creating focus so the intention feels deliberate rather than rushed.
steps: Choose a spot where you won't be interrupted for 10–15 minutes
Sit comfortably and take a few slow breaths to settle
Have your cleansed, charged, activated crystal within reach
quiet-space.best_for_default: everyone — programming is a focus practice, so a quiet space sets the tone. Even a corner of your desk or a bedside spot works.

hold-focus.name: 2. Hold the Crystal & Focus
hold-focus.tradition: Holding the stone in your receiving (non-dominant) hand while focusing on your intention is the central act of programming — the stone becomes the object your attention rests on.
hold-focus.practical: No physical effect on the stone — the practice turns the object into a personal cue for a specific thought or goal.
steps: Hold the crystal in your receiving (non-dominant) hand
Close your eyes or soften your gaze
Bring to mind the single intention you want to carry
hold-focus.best_for_default: anyone setting an intention — the tactile anchor of holding the stone helps keep the mind on the thought rather than letting it wander.

repeat-affirmation.name: 3. Repeat Your Affirmation
repeat-affirmation.tradition: Repeating a short affirmation silently or aloud is said to 'write' the intention into the stone — the words become linked to the object.
repeat-affirmation.practical: This is a mindfulness technique (similar to mantra practice) — the repetition helps fix the intention in your own mind, with the stone as a physical reminder.
steps: Phrase your intention as a short, present-tense affirmation (e.g. 'I stay calm under pressure')
Repeat it slowly, 10–20 times, while holding the stone
Let each repetition feel deliberate, not mechanical
repeat-affirmation.best_for_default: those who respond to verbal or written cues — putting the intention into words makes it concrete and gives the stone a clear 'job'.

visualize.name: 4. Visualize the Outcome
visualize.tradition: Picturing the outcome you want — calmly, briefly — is considered a way to attach the vision to the stone, so holding it later recalls the goal.
visualize.practical: Visualization is a well-known mindfulness and performance practice (athletes, speakers use it); the stone simply becomes the tactile trigger for the image.
steps: With the stone still in hand, picture a specific moment of your intention fulfilled
Keep it brief and calm — 1–2 minutes is enough
Notice how the stone feels in your hand as you hold the image
visualize.best_for_default: those who think in images — pairing a mental picture with the physical stone makes the intention easier to recall later.

rest.name: 5. Rest & Close the Ritual
rest.tradition: Placing the stone down deliberately to 'rest' with the intention is considered the closing of the ritual — the programming is set.
rest.practical: No physical effect — this simply marks the end of the focus practice and the stone's new role as a personal cue.
steps: Thank yourself (or the ritual) briefly — a small closing gesture
Place the stone where you'll see or wear it daily
The programming is complete — let the stone serve as a reminder
rest.best_for_default: everyone — closing the ritual makes the practice feel complete, and placing the stone somewhere visible turns it into an ongoing reminder of the intention.

prerequisite_chain.position: M2前置（program是最后一步，前三步先做）
prerequisite_chain.metaphor: wash hands → take a clean bowl → fill it with food → serve it on the table
prerequisite_chain.compliance: Setting an intention or affirmation you'd like to carry with you — the stone becomes a tactile cue for that thought.

main_commercial.reason: Durable (Mohs 7), versatile, and traditionally associated with clarity — a forgiving stone to program a first intention into
main_commercial.compliance_phrase: A versatile piece collectors often describe as a neutral staple that pairs with any setting

semantic_match.reason: A common stone for calm/sleep intentions — program a wind-down affirmation and keep it on the nightstand
semantic_match.compliance_phrase: A stone many keep on their nightstand as part of a wind-down ritual before bed

entry_price.reason: A common bracelet stone — program a self-compassion intention and wear it as a daily reminder
entry_price.compliance_phrase: A rose quartz bracelet many people wear as a daily reminder to be gentle with themselves

niche.reason: Often associated with warmth and sunlight — program a positivity or motivation intention
niche.compliance_phrase: Often associated with warmth and sunlight — a piece many enjoy as a bright accent in a collection

safety_warning.reason: A popular daily-wear stone — program a grounding/steadiness intention for a busy workday
safety_warning.compliance_phrase: A popular choice for those who like a grounding touchstone during a busy workday

jewelry_scene.reason: Soft sheen linked to lunar traditions — program an intuition or new-beginning intention
jewelry_scene.compliance_phrase: A stone many choose for its soft iridescent sheen and connection to lunar ritual traditions

data_snapshot.mineral_safety_reference_version: v1.0 (program无物理接触风险，但前置cleanse/charge/activate需查耐受)
data_snapshot.verified_by: 数据一致性 diff + 人工抽检

positions: M2-end-decision-card (前置链路后：先cleanse再program，查耐受)
tool_cta.card_template:
> 💡 **Programming a stone? Cleanse it first.**
> Before setting an intention, run your stone through the **[Crystal Cleansing Timer](/tools/crystal-cleansing-timer/)** →
> confirm its tolerance, cleanse it safely, then program with confidence.

insertion_points.M3-hold-focus: 握石program时traditionally用非主导手(接收手)；一条手链一个意图(one bracelet, one intention)
insertion_points.M3-rest: program后佩戴手链——每次看到/触摸都是意图的触觉提醒(tactile cue)
insertion_points.M6-one-intention: 一条手链一个意图：避免一条手链设多个矛盾意图，保持清晰
insertion_points.M7-faq: Can I program a crystal bracelet? → 可以；program后佩戴作为daily reminder，one bracelet one intention

jewelry_angle.m6_role: brief (one bracelet one intention + 佩戴作为触觉提醒)

eastern_touch.repeat-affirmation: Mantra / 咒语 重复 (东方冥想传统的肯定语重复)
eastern_touch.visualize: 观想 / 可视化 (藏传佛教观想修法)
eastern_touch.hold-focus: 禅修握石 / 瑜伽手印 (东方冥想传统)

M1_quick_answer: program本身无物理风险(意图设定)，但前置cleanse/charge需查石耐受
进入方法前一句话'program前先完成cleanse/charge/activate'
M2_order_hardware: 第一段(前置链路): program是最后一步——先洗手→拿干净碗→盛饭→端上桌(cleanse→charge→activate→program)
第二段(为什么program): 传统/象征(给石一个明确任务，作为日常触觉提醒)
第三段(概念区分): Program vs Activate局部对比(装软件vs开机) + 内链H1完整四概念表
safety_first_narrative.compliance_phrasing: setting an intention / a tactile cue for that thought / many people experience

howto_6_steps.name: Decide on one clear intention
howto_6_steps.text: 选一个明确的意图(present-tense affirmation)，一条石一个意图

howto_6_steps.name: Find a quiet space & hold the stone
howto_6_steps.text: 安静空间坐定，握石于接收手(非主导手)，专注意图

howto_6_steps.name: Repeat your affirmation & visualize
howto_6_steps.text: 重复肯定语10-20次+可视化目标完成场景2-3min

howto_6_steps.name: Close the ritual & place the stone
howto_6_steps.text: 小closing gesture→放置/佩戴于日常可见处

howto_6_steps.name: Use it as a daily tactile reminder
howto_6_steps.text: 佩戴/触摸时回忆意图——石成为该想法的触觉cue

schema.howto_name: How to Program a Crystal with an Intention

avoid: makes the crystal work for you
programs the crystal to manifest your goals
guarantees your intention will come true
compliance.gentle_note: Crystal programming is based on spiritual traditions, symbolism, and personal mindfulness. There is no scientific evidence that crystals store intentions or influence outcomes, but the practice of setting a clear intention — and using the stone as a tactile reminder of it — is a genuine mindfulness technique that many people find helpful.

three_perspectives.style: 融在段落里（program心理学权重略高：意图设定+触觉cue是真实mindfulness技术）

hero.scene: 手持水晶设定意图+安静空间(program主题视觉)

step_diagrams.scene: 握石冥想+设定意图(hold-focus step)
